creator: starikoff@mail.ru
text:
Hi there!

I had issue at installation process with this port on FreeBSD 11.1-STABLE. If I run 'make config' in '/usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger/' then I see two checkbox only: "DEBUG" and "SYMLINK". And where are "NGINX" and "APACHE"? I need "NGINX" only. And after pressing OK-button the OS start to download 'rubygem-passenger-apache'. But it do not need me. I tried to insert into '/etc/make.conf' the option "NGINX=on". But we have the same issue.

If I replace string 'FLAVOR?=${FLAVORS:[1]}' in the file '/usr/ports/www/rubygem-passenger/Makefile' on other one 'FLAVOR?=${FLAVORS:[2]}' then I download the properly port 'rubygem-passenger-nginx'. And it seems all works properly for me.

With best regards,
Alexey.
